application_deadlines.notes: Decisions released in late March / early April.

supplemental_requirements.details: Three short essays: A 'Thank You' note to someone you haven't thanked (150-200 words), a 'Community' exploration essay (150-200 words), and a 'School-specific' academic interest essay (150-200 words).
Additional program-specific essay (400-650 words) addressing interdisciplinary knowledge, vision, and plans.

holistic_factors.specific_differentiators: Penn highly values its Early Decision round for yield protection (accounting for over 50% of the class). Legacy students make up ~13.6-14% of the admitted pool.
